'''valuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:taarof|taarof]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-l-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:taarof|taarof]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| valuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vælijith|vælijith]] || [[word:vælijij|vælijij]] || [[word:vælijish|vælijish]] || [[word:væliji|væliji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:valulujuth|valulujuth]] || [[word:valulujuj|valulujuj]] || [[word:valulujush|valulujush]] || [[word:valuluju|valuluju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:valujuth|valujuth]] || [[word:valujuj|valujuj]] || [[word:valujush|valujush]] || [[word:valuju|valuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:valufjuth|valufjuth]] || [[word:valufjuj|valufjuj]] || [[word:valufjush|valufjush]] || [[word:valufjuf|valufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:valujuthu|valujuthu]] || [[word:valujuju|valujuju]] || [[word:valujushu|valujushu]] || [[word:valujuku|valujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:valujuth|valujuth]] || [[word:valujuj|valujuj]] || [[word:valujush|valujush]] || [[word:valuju|valuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:valujuthul|valujuthul]] || [[word:valujujul|valujujul]] || [[word:valujushul|valujushul]] || [[word:valujukul|valujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:valujuthuthu|valujuthuthu]] || [[word:valujujuju|valujujuju]] || [[word:valujushushu|valujushushu]] || [[word:valujuku|valujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:valujuthun|valujuthun]] || [[word:valujujun|valujujun]] || [[word:valujushun|valujushun]] || [[word:valujukun|valujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:valujuthuoro|valujuthuoro]] || [[word:valujujuoro|valujujuoro]] || [[word:valujushuoro|valujushuoro]] || [[word:valujukuoro|valujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
